ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., brightness, air conditioner) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the home */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the sensor */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Current battery level of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the sensor expires */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor providing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "data_value_json" TEXT /* Data value in JSON format */,
  "data_value_cbor" TEXT /* Data value in CBOR format */,
  "data_value_smile" TEXT /* Data value in SMILE format */,
  "data_value_exi4json" TEXT /* Data value in EXI4JSON format */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format used for the data value */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, external API) */,
  "data_compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the data if compressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value that the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value that the sensor can measure */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data (e.g., lumens, degrees Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number where the location is situated */,
  "room_area" REAL /* Area of the room in square meters */,
  "room_height" REAL /* Height of the room in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the permission */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which the permission is granted */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Description of the access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "permission_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "permission_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high brightness, low air quality) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_trend" TEXT /* Trends observed in the data readings */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the sensor */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., JSON, CBOR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  "format_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility notes for the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being converted */,
  "from_format" TEXT /* Original format of the data */,
  "to_format" TEXT /* Target format of the data post-conversion */,
  "conversion_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the conversion */,
  "conversion_status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_conversions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which health is logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, faulty) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health was last checked */,
  "issues_reported" TEXT /* Issues reported regarding the sensor's performance */,
  "health_score" INTEGER /* Overall health score of the sensor (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "last_diagnostic_run" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last diagnostic run */,
  "diagnostic_results" TEXT /* Results of the last diagnostic run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_health_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
